title: chrysanthemum coronarium subsp. discolor
intro: Chrysanthemum coronarium subsp. discolor, also known as the golden chamomile or yellow chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, helping to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality due to its calming effects. Chrysanthemum coronarium subsp. discolor is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
